ddt:Target.Name: HU5_ENTRY470_Series E 40_0_00.00.12.ddt
ddt:Target.Description: Series E 40.0 , AY16 0x024404 Base 0x024504 ECE/CD 0x024604 USA 0x024704 ASIA

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Fuel Consumption and Recuperation Screen and Energy Flow Screen

Item.Text: display Drive Program indication for Onroad
display Drive Program indication for Offroed
display Drive Program indication for Onroad&Offroad
reserved for automatic download for unread message

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: Anti Theft locked - PIN missing/wrong vehicle
Map data locked (anti-theft protection i.e. unlock code in HU and CID of SD card do not match)
Map data locked (illegal copy -> copy protection, i.e. CID of SD card does not match that of the unlock code on SD card)
Map data locked (illegal copy -> no unlock code is found to be applicable to the map version on SD card)
Navigation SD card write-protected. SD card write-protected.
Error for corrupt data files (map, resource, etc.).
DISP_C-LVDS Tx+ and Tx- shortcut together
Media Interface not supported device plugged
Media Interface communication Error defective data
Media Interface communication Error unknown data
Navigation Compatibility Error - Navigation-Software is not compatible with Command software
Navigation Compatibility Error - Map-Version is not compatible with Navigation-Software
Media Interface charging current to high
Software watchdog navigation executed (if navigation triggers watchdog)
external Fan - DTC activate only if switch - external Fan - in Variant Coding (several application - application 10 - External FAN) activ = 1
High Speed CAN Communication Bus (User CAN Bus) Performance.BusOff.
Lost Communication With Vehicle Security Control Module
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 0 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 1 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 2 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 3 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 4 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
Ring Break - Segment before Pos. 5 is damaged (Number of position will be counted in backwards light direction)
High Speed HU-CAN Communication Bus Performance.BusOff.
